turns.text: I would like a commercial and legal company Agreement for software development and maintenance between Flexore Group LTD (Flexore Group) with company number HE442316 and address Nikolaou Nikolaidi, 10 PITTAKEIO MEGARO, 3rd floor, Flat/Office 305 8010, Paphos, Cyprus with CompanyB in Dubai.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
COMMERCIAL AND LEGAL COMPANY AGREEMENT FOR SOFTWARE DEVELOPMENT AND MAINTENANCE BETWEEN COMPANY A AND COMPANY B

This Agreement is made and entered into effective as of DATE, by and between Flexore Group LTD (Flexore Group), a corporation organized and existing under the laws of Cyprus, having its registered office at Nikolaou Nikolaidi, 10 PITTAKEIO MEGARO, 3rd floor, Flat/Office 305 8010, Paphos, Cyprus, and COMPANY B, a corporation organized and existing under the laws of Dubai, having its registered office at ADDRESS.

WHEREAS, COMPANY A desires to engage COMPANY B as a software development and maintenance service provider, and COMPANY B desires to provide such services to COMPANY A, subject to the terms and conditions set forth herein.

NOW, THEREFORE, in consideration of the mutual promises and agreements contained herein, the parties agree as follows:

1. Definitions.

1.1 "Services" mean the software development and maintenance services described in Exhibit A hereto.

1.2 "System" means the computer hardware and software as described in Exhibit A, which the Services are to be provided as per the terms and conditions set forth herein.

2. Services. 

2.1 COMPANY B agrees to provide the Services to COMPANY A in accordance with the provisions of this Agreement and the specifications in Exhibit A. COMPANY A agrees to provide COMPANY B with all necessary and reasonable assistance to enable COMPANY B to perform its obligations under this Agreement, including timely delivery of information, training, testing, and feedback.

2.2 COMPANY B will perform the work under this Agreement at its own premises or elsewhere as appropriate.

2.3 COMPANY A may, at its option and expense, request COMPANY B to (i) perform services not included in Exhibit A, (ii) modify the System, and/or (iii) receive training on the System. If COMPANY B agrees to perform such additional services or modifications, the parties will negotiate and agree upon a change order reflecting the nature and scope of the additional services or modifications, the fees for such additional services or modifications, and the time required for the completion of such additional services or modifications.

3. Fees and Payment. 

3.1 COMPANY A agrees to pay COMPANY B the fees set forth in Exhibit A for the Services performed under this Agreement. Such fees exclude all applicable taxes, which shall be added by COMPANY B to the invoice in accordance with the applicable laws. Payment of fees shall be made in the currency stated in Exhibit A.

3.2 Unless otherwise specified in Exhibit A, invoicing will be made at the end of each month in which the Services are provided. An invoice shall include a detailed breakdown of the Services provided during such month and the corresponding fees.

3.3 All fees under this Agreement shall be due and payable by COMPANY A within 30 days of the invoice date.

4. Confidentiality. 

4.1 Each party agrees to maintain the confidentiality of the other party's confidential information and to use such information solely for the purpose of performing its obligations under this Agreement.

4.2 The parties agree that the terms and conditions of this Agreement represent confidential information of both parties.

4.3 The parties agree to take all appropriate measures to prevent unauthorized disclosure or use of such confidential information in accordance with their respective internal policies.

5. Intellectual Property Rights. 

5.1 COMPANY B shall retain exclusive ownership of all Intellectual Property Rights (as defined below) in and to the Services and the System, including all updates, modifications, and enhancements thereof made by COMPANY B. 

5.2 For purposes of this Agreement, "Intellectual Property Rights" shall mean all rights, title, and interest in and to patents, copyrights, trademarks, trade secrets, or other proprietary rights in any part of the System, as well as any technical data or other information related thereto.

5.3 Nothing in this Agreement shall be construed as granting to COMPANY A any right or license under the Intellectual Property Rights of COMPANY B, except as expressly permitted in this Agreement.

6. Warranties and Representations. 

6.1 COMPANY B warrants and represents that it has the necessary knowledge and experience to provide the Services and that the Services shall be performed in a professional and workmanlike manner in accordance with industry standards.

6.2 COMPANY A warrants and represents that it is duly authorized to enter into this Agreement and will not in any way infringe or violate any rights of any third party by virtue of this Agreement.

7. Term and Termination. 

7.1 This Agreement shall be effective as of the date first above written and shall continue in effect until the termination of this Agreement.

7.2 Either party may terminate this Agreement upon thirty (30) days' written notice to the other party.

7.3 In the event of termination of this Agreement, COMPANY A shall have no further obligation to pay any unused fees for the Services or for any costs associated with any modifications or additional services requested.

8. Limitation of Liability. 

8.1 Except for claims arising out of a party's breach of confidentiality or Intellectual Property Rights, neither COMPANY B nor COMPANY A shall be liable for any indirect, special, consequential, incidental, or punitive damages arising out of or related to this Agreement, including, but not limited to, loss of profits or business interruption, even if such party has been advised of the possibility of such damages.

8.2 In no event shall either party's total liability to the other party hereunder exceed the total amount of fees paid by COMPANY A to COMPANY B during the twelve-month period immediately preceding the date the liability arose.

9. Governing Law and Jurisdiction. 

9.1 This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Cyprus.

9.2 Any dispute arising out of or related to this Agreement or the breach thereof shall be settled by arbitration in accordance with the rules of Cyprus.

10. Entire Agreement. 

10.1 This Agreement, including all Exhibits attached hereto, constitutes the entire agreement of the parties and supersedes all prior and contemporaneous agreements and understandings, whether oral or written, relating to the subject matter hereof.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties have executed this Agreement as of the date first above written.

FLEXORE GROUP LTD

By: _________________________________

Name: _______________________________

Title: ________________________________

COMPANY B

By: _________________________________

Name: _______________________________

Title: ________________________________ 

EXHIBIT A – SERVICES

The Services shall include the following:

1. Software development and maintenance services for the following web application:

- DESCRIPTION

2. Maintenance and support of a software package:

- DESCRIPTION

COMPENSATION

- COMPANY A agrees to pay COMPANY B the sum of $__________ per month in consideration of the Services described above.
- The fee shall not be adjusted for work done by COMPANY B that exceeds the anticipated hours per month.
- No additional compensation shall be paid by COMPANY A for work performed by COMPANY B under this Agreement unless agreed to in advance by both parties in writing.
